cards.title: Repo reframe & scaffold
cards.description: Initialize repo structure, README, docs, dashboard skeleton aligned with the OpenAI Parameter Golf Challenge (16 MB artifact / 10 min 8xH100).

cards.title: Vercel deploy readiness
cards.description: Verify dashboard builds cleanly. Connect to Vercel project. Set root directory to dashboard/. Test preview deploy.

cards.title: GitHub public push readiness
cards.description: Audit repo for secrets. Confirm .gitignore covers .env.local. Create remote. Push. Set visibility to public.

cards.title: Architecture sizing: parameter budget at 16 MB
cards.description: Calculate how many parameters fit in 16 MB at FP32, FP16, BF16, INT8. Factor in embedding table (vocab size × hidden dim). Produce a sizing table in docs/.
cards.evidence: Sizing doc produced at docs/sizing-16mb.md (2026-03-19). Key findings: FP16/BF16 ≈ 8.4M params; INT8 ≈ 16.8M. Vocabulary is the critical budget sink — 32K vocab at D=512 alone exceeds 16 MB. Recommended baseline: V=4096, D=256, L=9, BF16, weight-tied embedding.

cards.title: Literature scan: tiny LM architecture results
cards.description: Survey papers on sub-100M parameter language models (GPT-2 small, Mamba, RWKV, etc.). What architectures achieve best perplexity per parameter? Document in ideas/.

cards.title: Baseline design: transformer at 16 MB FP16
cards.description: Sketch a standard transformer architecture that fits in 16 MB at FP16. Choose depth, hidden dim, heads, MLP ratio. Estimate compute needed for 10 min training.

cards.title: Hypothesis ranking: top 3 for first design experiments
cards.description: Review /ideas/index.md. Score all ideas on expected impact vs uncertainty. Move top 3 to experiment design. Write ideas/ranked.md.
cards.evidence: Ranked memo produced at ideas/ranked.md (2026-03-19). Top 3: (1) Small vocab + weight tying — mandatory precondition, not optional; (2) INT8 quantization — doubles param budget if challenge accepts it; (3) Depth/width ratio — deeper+narrower wins at small scale, D=256 L=9 baseline recommended.

cards.title: Alternative design: SSM/Mamba at 16 MB
cards.description: Sketch a Mamba or S4-based architecture that fits in 16 MB. Compare parameter efficiency vs transformer baseline. Is SSM more efficient at this scale?

cards.title: Quantization: INT8 artifact size reduction
cards.description: Research post-training quantization (PTQ) to reduce artifact from FP16 to INT8. Does 2x size reduction trade off acceptably against quality? Document findings.

cards.title: Symphony: prototype board-driven advisor (Hypothesis B)
cards.description: Implement a one-shot script that reads experiments/*/findings.md and writes new hypothesis cards to board/backlog.json. Human reviews before any card moves.

cards.title: Upstream repo watch: track commits & new PRs
cards.description: Periodically inspect the upstream OpenAI Parameter Golf repo for new commits, opened PRs, and merged changes. Record findings in board/upstream-log.md following the protocol in docs/repo-watch.md.
cards.evidence: See board/upstream-log.md for running findings log.

cards.title: Accepted PR scanner: log notable merged submissions
cards.description: After each upstream repo inspection, scan merged PRs for novel techniques (architecture choices, quantization tricks, data strategies). Summarize in board/upstream-log.md under 'Accepted PRs'.
cards.evidence: No accepted PRs logged yet. First pass: 2026-03-19.

cards.title: Leaderboard log: record notable public scores
cards.description: Maintain a running leaderboard section in board/upstream-log.md. Track any publicly reported evaluation scores or benchmark results from accepted submissions.

cards.title: Community signals: scan discussions & issues
cards.description: Monitor upstream repo issues/discussions and any linked community threads for emerging techniques, reported gotchas, or dataset/eval surprises. Log key signals in upstream-log.md.

cards.title: Verify: does challenge accept INT8 artifacts?
cards.description: Check challenge rules and any upstream repo documentation to confirm whether INT8-quantized model files are accepted as submissions. This is the single highest-stakes open question: a yes doubles the effective parameter budget from ~8.4M to ~16.8M. Log answer in docs/sizing-16mb.md under open questions.
cards.evidence: Surfaced by sizing analysis in docs/sizing-16mb.md. INT8 = 2× param budget. Must verify before committing to BF16-only baseline design.

cards.title: Baseline design: V=4096 D=256 L=9 BF16 transformer
cards.description: Write a concrete architecture spec for the recommended BF16 baseline: V=4096 BPE vocab, D=256 hidden dim, 9 transformer layers, weight-tied embedding, MLP ratio 4. Include: estimated params (~8.1M), estimated artifact size (~16.2 MB), head count, estimated training throughput on 8xH100, and any open hyper-parameter choices. Store in experiments/EXP-001/spec.md.
cards.evidence: Sizing analysis (docs/sizing-16mb.md) identifies this as the lowest-risk BF16 starting point. Unblocks all downstream experiments.
